## Problem

What are you trying to do that the extension doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

The API or behaviour you'd like. If it maps to a clickhouse-go feature or a
ClickHouse type, link it.

## Alternatives

Any workaround you're using now.

## Additional context

Anything else — use case, volume, performance expectations.
